post.title: AI Levels
post.content:
<iframe width="560" height="315" src="https://www.youtube.com/embed/bDcgHzCBgmQ?si=z-z9ltc89pxXBu0s" title="YouTube video player" frameborder="0" allow="accelerometer; autoplay; clipboard-write; encrypted-media; gyroscope; picture-in-picture; web-share" referrerpolicy="strict-origin-when-cross-origin" allowfullscreen></iframe>

Also available as blog post [here](https://www.danshapiro.com/blog/2026/01/the-five-levels-from-spicy-autocomplete-to-the-software-factory/).

My current goal is lvl 3.
